name: 1 Swing Golf
about: 1 Swing Golf is an indoor golf training studio in Scottsdale, Arizona, offering private lessons and structured coaching packages. The facility is led by Rotary Swing certified instructors who focus on pre-planned lessons based on student goals, brain processing, and biomechanics. Lessons are available in packages ranging from introductory sessions to multi-month development programs, with a strong emphasis on structured, progressive instruction to help golfers of all skill levels improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Structured, goal-oriented lesson plans based on biomechanics and brain processing
Flexible packages for all skill levels, from beginner to development
Couples-friendly lessons with state-of-the-art technology integration

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, but it mentions club fitting services, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment or inquire during booking.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services on the website, so it's unclear if external food or drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on 18-hole simulator sessions, as the focus is on lessons rather than full rounds.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of kid-friendly amenities or youth programs on the website, so this information is unclear.
